twitter_thread: I tested 17 AI video generators and found 14 had features I never used. 3 core features are often enough.
CapCut's pre-made templates can save 2 hours of editing time per video, making it a top choice.
For mental models, a simple text outline can be 5x faster to create than a Coggle diagram.
Output format restrictions can add 30% to production time – choose a flexible AI tool.
Luma and Raw Shorts offer advanced features, but cost 3x more than basic tools like CapCut.
Prioritizing the 20% of features you'll use 80% of the time can save $500/yr on AI tool costs.
What's the most frustrating AI tool experience you've had, and how did you resolve it? #aitools #videocreation
